title: 查询透明桥接服务(只读)
code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
# 1. 枚举服务实例(只读;不创建桥接)
$svcs = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_TransparentBridgingService)
$svcs | ForEach-Object { $_.__PATH }
# 2. 从 WMI 类读取方法签名
$cls = [wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ':Msvm_TransparentBridgingService')
$cls.Options.UseAmendedQualifiers = $true
$cls.Methods | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }               # RequestStateChange, StartService, StopService
$rsc = $cls.Methods['RequestStateChange']
@($rsc.InParameters.Properties  | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })  # RequestedState, TimeoutPeriod
@($rsc.OutParameters.Properties | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })  # Job, ReturnValue
# StartService / StopService 无 IN 参数,返回 uint32
# 3. 相关的已学习 MAC 转发表类(仅读取存在性)
[wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ':Msvm_DynamicForwardingEntry')  # 属性含 MACAddress, VlanId
output:
InstanceCount=1
  PATH=\\WIN-OMK556K17QL\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_TransparentBridgingService.CreationClassName="Msvm_TransparentBridgingService",Name="ED26F337-99A1-4278-AF48-CCA45C91C200",SystemCreationClassName="Msvm_ComputerSystem",SystemName="WIN-OMK556K17QL"
Methods=RequestStateChange,StartService,StopService
  method[RequestStateChange]=True
  method[StartService]=True
  method[StopService]=True
  sig[StartService] inParams=0
  sig[StopService] inParams=0
  RequestStateChange.IN=RequestedState,TimeoutPeriod
  RequestStateChange.OUT=Job,ReturnValue
  Desc=Serves as a placeholder for the service inside the switch that learns MAC addresses. It se
Msvm_DynamicForwardingEntry.classPresent=True
  DFE.props=Caption,CommunicationStatus,CreationClassName,Description,DetailedStatus,DynamicStatus,ElementName,HealthState,InstallDate,InstanceID,MACAddress,Name,OperatingStatus,OperationalStatus,PrimaryStatus,ServiceCreationClassName,ServiceName,Status,StatusDescriptions,SystemCreationClassName,SystemName,VlanId
RESULT=PASS
notes: 此为纯读操作,不创建桥接、不改动主机网络。Msvm_TransparentBridgingService 实例的 Name 为 GUID,System 为主机 Msvm_ComputerSystem;该服务始终存在,不限于存在交换机时才出现。

该类无实例属性,提供三个方法:StartService()->uint32、StopService()->uint32(均无参),以及继承自 CIM_EnabledLogicalElement 的 RequestStateChange(IN uint16 RequestedState, IN datetime TimeoutPeriod, OUT CIM_ConcreteJob Job)。RequestStateChange 仅声明返回码 0=Completed、1=Not supported。
该服务是交换机内部学习 MAC 地址的占位服务,关联 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch 与 Msvm_DynamicForwardingEntry(动态转发表,含 MACAddress/VlanId)。
读取方法签名须使用 [wmiclass] 并设置 $cls.Options.UseAmendedQualifiers=$true;OUT 参数除 Job 外,运行时还包含隐式的 ReturnValue。
调用 StartService/StopService 或 RequestStateChange 会影响主机交换机的 MAC 学习与桥接,可能中断网络。建议仅用于枚举实例与读取方法签名。
notes_en: This is a pure read operation that creates no bridge and does not modify host networking. The Name of an Msvm_TransparentBridgingService instance is a GUID, and its System is the host Msvm_ComputerSystem; the service always exists and is not present only when a switch exists.

This class has no instance properties and provides three methods: StartService()->uint32, StopService()->uint32 (both parameterless), and RequestStateChange(IN uint16 RequestedState, IN datetime TimeoutPeriod, OUT CIM_ConcreteJob Job) inherited from CIM_EnabledLogicalElement. RequestStateChange declares only the return codes 0=Completed and 1=Not supported.

This service is the placeholder service inside the switch that learns MAC addresses; it is associated with Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch and Msvm_DynamicForwardingEntry (the dynamic forwarding table, containing MACAddress/VlanId).
Reading the method signatures requires using [wmiclass] and setting $cls.Options.UseAmendedQualifiers=$true; besides Job, the OUT parameters also include an implicit ReturnValue at runtime.

Calling StartService/StopService or RequestStateChange affects the host switch's MAC learning and bridging and may disrupt networking. It is recommended to use this only to enumerate instances and read method signatures.
code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
# 1. Enumerate the service instances (read-only; does not create a bridge)
$svcs = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_TransparentBridgingService)
$svcs | ForEach-Object { $_.__PATH }
# 2. Read the method signatures from the WMI class
$cls = [wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ':Msvm_TransparentBridgingService')
$cls.Options.UseAmendedQualifiers = $true
$cls.Methods | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }               # RequestStateChange, StartService, StopService
$rsc = $cls.Methods['RequestStateChange']
@($rsc.InParameters.Properties  | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })  # RequestedState, TimeoutPeriod
@($rsc.OutParameters.Properties | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })  # Job, ReturnValue
# StartService / StopService have no IN parameters and return uint32
# 3. The related learned-MAC forwarding table class (existence check only)
[wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ':Msvm_DynamicForwardingEntry')  # properties include MACAddress, VlanId
